product: Serve custom LLMs with Custom Model Serving (Beta)
tagline: You can now serve custom and fine tuned LLMs on Databricks with a vLLM engine, including multimodal models and PEFT recipes that Foundation Model APIs does not support.
what_it_does: You can now serve custom and fine tuned LLMs on Databricks with a vLLM engine, including multimodal models and PEFT recipes that Foundation Model APIs does not support. Custom LLM Serving is in Beta. Beta This feature is in Beta.
why_it_matters: Select a GPU based on your model's memory and performance needs.
plain_summary: You can now serve custom and fine tuned LLMs on Databricks with a vLLM engine, including multimodal models and PEFT recipes that Foundation Model APIs does not support. Custom LLM Serving is in Beta.
key_takeaway: You can now serve custom and fine tuned LLMs on Databricks with a vLLM engine, including multimodal models and PEFT recipes that Foundation Model APIs does not support.
